name: Anxious Attachment — Relationship Threat Response
description: Adults with anxious attachment style respond to perceived relationship threats with heightened monitoring, reassurance-seeking, and protest behavior, driven by early inconsistent caregiving.

beliefs: I'm not sure I'm enough for my partner
if they loved me they'd respond quickly

stimulus.description: Partner hasn't responded to a text message for 3 hours. Usually responds within 30 minutes. No explanation given.

expected.behavior: sends multiple follow-up texts, checks partner's social media, mentally rehearses confrontation, can't focus on other tasks

sources: Hazan & Shaver 1987 — Romantic Love as Attachment Process
